description: Rebuild the Landing page (app/page.tsx) and Onboarding flow (app/onboarding/page.tsx) with cinematic hero section, premium sign-in card, product showcase, and immersive animated onboarding scenes with custom pickers and confetti.
steps: Completely rewrite app/page.tsx with: (1) Cinematic hero section with large animated heading, gradient text accents, and smooth entrance animations. (2) Premium sign-in card/button using signIn('google', { callbackUrl: '/dashboard' }) from next-auth/react. (3) Product showcase section with feature cards showing AI Assistant, Smart Scheduling, Task Management, Habit Tracking - each with subtle hover animations and icons. (4) Background ambient effects (gradient meshes, floating orbs). (5) Clean footer. (6) All animations using framer-motion with spring configs. Use Notion-like clean typography.

Completely rewrite app/onboarding/page.tsx with: (1) Full-screen immersive flow with animated scene transitions between steps. (2) Keep the same form fields: role selection, occupation, work hours (start/end), wake/sleep times, daily routine, priorities, goals. (3) Use the same postOnboarding() import from @/lib/api with the same payload shape. (4) Premium custom time picker UI instead of plain selects. (5) Animated progress indicator. (6) Confetti/celebration animation on final step completion. (7) Spring-based slide transitions between steps. (8) Keep the same useSession() and router.push('/dashboard') on completion.
Run pnpm build to verify no type errors or build failures.
acceptance_criteria: Landing page uses signIn('google', { callbackUrl: '/dashboard' }) for auth

Onboarding uses postOnboarding() from @/lib/api with the same payload shape (role, occupation, work_hours_start, work_hours_end, wake_time, sleep_time, daily_routine, priorities, goals, onboarding_complete)
findings: Build, lint, and tests all pass. Landing page enhanced with floating orbs animation component, per-card gradient overlays, trust section with shield icon, and subtle grid pattern background. Onboarding enhanced with confetti celebration animation (50 particles with physics), glass morphism progress bar, custom TimeSelect component with dropdown chevron, and PartyPopper icon on summary step. Both pages fully responsive and use framer-motion spring configs.
